content.content:
<gap:target id="profiles-block">
    <profiles>
      <gap:target id="profile-dev">
        <profile>
          <gap:target id="profile-dev-id">dev</gap:target>
          <gap:target id="profile-dev-properties">
            <properties>
              <gap:target id="dev-active-profile">spring.profiles.active=dev</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="dev-hibernate-ddl-auto">spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="dev-show-sql">spring.jpa.show-sql=true</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="dev-flyway-enabled">spring.flyway.enabled=true</gap:target>
            </properties>
          </gap:target>
        </profile>
      </gap:target>

      <gap:target id="profile-test">
        <profile>
          <gap:target id="profile-test-id">test</gap:target>
          <gap:target id="profile-test-properties">
            <properties>
              <gap:target id="test-active-profile">spring.profiles.active=test</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="test-datasource-url">spring.datasource.url=jdbc:h2:mem:testdb;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1;DB_CLOSE_ON_EXIT=FALSE</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="test-datasource-driver">spring.datasource.driver-class-name=org.h2.Driver</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="test-datasource-username">spring.datasource.username=sa</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="test-datasource-password">spring.datasource.password=</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="test-hibernate-ddl-auto">spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=create-drop</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="test-show-sql">spring.jpa.show-sql=false</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="test-flyway-enabled">spring.flyway.enabled=false</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="test-testcontainers-enabled">testcontainers.enabled=false</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="test-logging-level-root">logging.level.root=WARN</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="test-logging-level-org-springframework">logging.level.org.springframework=INFO</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="test-logging-level-org-hibernate">logging.level.org.hibernate=WARN</gap:target>
            </properties>
          </gap:target>
        </profile>
      </gap:target>

      <gap:target id="profile-staging">
        <profile>
          <gap:target id="profile-staging-id">staging</gap:target>
          <gap:target id="profile-staging-properties">
            <properties>
              <gap:target id="staging-active-profile">spring.profiles.active=staging</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="staging-hibernate-ddl-auto">spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=validate</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="staging-show-sql">spring.jpa.show-sql=false</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="staging-flyway-enabled">spring.flyway.enabled=true</gap:target>
            </properties>
          </gap:target>
        </profile>
      </gap:target>

      <gap:target id="profile-production">
        <profile>
          <gap:target id="profile-production-id">production</gap:target>
          <gap:target id="profile-production-properties">
            <properties>
              <gap:target id="production-active-profile">spring.profiles.active=production</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="production-hibernate-ddl-auto">spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=validate</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="production-show-sql">spring.jpa.show-sql=false</gap:target>
              <gap:target id="production-flyway-enabled">spring.flyway.enabled=true</gap:target>
            </properties>
          </gap:target>
        </profile>
      </gap:target>
    </profiles>
  </gap:target>
